stem:
y > 4x + 8

For which of the following tables are all the values of x and their corresponding values of y solutions to the given inequality?
explanation: At x = 2 the inequality requires y > 4(2) + 8 = 16, so the y-value paired with 2 must exceed 16; only the first table does this (y = 19). Checking its other rows, 30 > 24 and 41 > 32 both hold, so every pair satisfies the inequality.
